name: Beijing Zhongkehaixun Digital S&T Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Zhongkehaixun Digital S&T Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of related products in the sonar field. It provides signal processing platforms, sonar systems, underwater acoustic big data and simulation systems, unmanned anti-submarine systems, and other related products to military customers. The company is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
